narrative_summary: - User asked how to select dbt assets that have an immediate upstream fivetran asset
- Loaded the Read tool via ToolSearch, then read the asset selection syntax reference at `skills/dagster-expert/references/cli/asset-selection.md`
- Answered using traversal syntax: `kind:fivetran+1 and kind:dbt` — selecting 1 level downstream of fivetran assets intersected with dbt assets
